text:
In a realm where the past and stars intertwine, there lived a shepherd named Lorian. His days began with the quiet hum of wildlife. One twilight, as he tended his flock by a glowing lake, he heard haunting melodies coming from deep within the trees.

Curious, Lorian ventured deeper. What he found was a circle of crystal-clear pools. At its center was a majestic owl, singing a story of stars fallen from the sky long ago. Lorian listened intently, learning the wisdom of the stars. When the owl fell silent, he pocketed a star feather.

Years turned the feather a curious shade of turquoise. One night, a darkness swallowed the sky; stars vanished as mysteriously as they had come. Lorian set out with his feather, seeking stars’ secrets.

He wandered until he reached a mountain’s edge. From there, a breeze carried a song—parting shot from a phoenix. It directed Lorian’s path to the heart of an ancient forest.
